name: Hol Horse
description:
**Height**: 188cm *(anime)*

Hol Horse is a minor antagonist in JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Stardust Crusaders (first seen in Chapter 141 and Episode 10), as well as one of the main characters of Crazy Diamond's Demonic Heartbreak. He is a tall, blonde-haired cowboy-themed mercenary, serving under Dio and his army of other Stand Users. He considers himself "The #2", preferring to work as support with a partner due to his cowardice and caution. He also respects women, no matter how pretty, or how ugly, as seen with his ex, Nena. 

His Stand is Emperor, named after the Tarot Card of the same name. It manifests itself as a retro-futuristic pistol, which functions as a normal firearm, although the bullets are able to change their trajectory to Hol Horse's command.

~!He is seemingly fatally injured by his own Stand's bullets in Chapter 221 (and episode 37 of the anime), but manages to survive and go into hiding, fearing Dio's punishment for failing his mission of killing the Joestar group.!~
